homepage.title: Verified public information and confidential reporting
homepage.introduction: The Garkuwa Platform is being developed to support verified news and public updates alongside a separate channel for confidential incident reporting. The reporting form is now available; news remains planned.
homepage.pillarsIntroduction: Information published for the public will remain separate from confidential reports reviewed by internal staff.
homepage.newsDescription: Announcements, advisories, warnings and public updates will be published after following a verification process.
homepage.reportingDescription: A dedicated form allows citizens to share incident information without creating an account.
homepage.trustIntroduction: The planned workflow reduces the personal information requested, but it does not make an absolute promise that risk can never occur.
homepage.trustAccounts: Citizen accounts will not be required to submit a report.
homepage.trustContact: Follow-up contact details will be optional.
homepage.trustTracking: Reports will not have a public tracking portal.
homepage.trustSeparation: Public information and confidential reports will follow separate workflows.
homepage.stepOneDescription: Review verified news, announcements and public advisories.
homepage.stepTwoDescription: Share relevant information through the confidential form without creating an account.
homepage.stepThreeDescription: Internal staff will review information through the administration system and take an appropriate next step.
homepage.linksDescription: Learn how the platform is planned, what to expect and where to find general help.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.introduction: Answers about the platform's purpose and the services being planned.

items.question: What is the Garkuwa Platform?
items.answer: It is a platform being developed for verified public information and a separate channel for confidential incident reports.

items.question: Why is Hausa the default language?
items.answer: Hausa is primary so information is easier to access for communities that use it in everyday life.

items.question: Is English supported?
items.answer: Yes. English pages are provided in the same application, while Hausa remains the primary public language.

items.question: Will citizens need accounts?
items.answer: No. Submitting a report does not require a citizen account.

items.question: Will contact details be mandatory?
items.answer: No. Providing contact details for possible follow-up is optional.

items.question: Can a report be tracked publicly?
items.answer: No. A public report-tracking portal is not planned.

items.question: How will confidential information be handled?
items.answer: The workflow is designed to limit requested information and keep reports separate from published content. Safeguards will continue to be reviewed as the service is developed.

items.question: How is public content different from incident reports?
items.answer: Public information will be verified before publication. Incident reports will enter an internal review workflow and will not be published automatically.

items.question: What should someone do during an immediate emergency?
items.answer: Do not wait for this platform. Contact the appropriate emergency services for the area where the emergency is happening.

items.question: Are the news and reporting services live?
items.answer: The incident reporting form is now available. Verified news and public updates remain under development.

help.title: Help
help.introduction: This page explains the available public pages and how to use the incident reporting form.

sections.title: Using the public site
sections.body: Use the primary navigation to return home or open the report form, questions, help, about and contact pages. Verified news remains under development.

sections.title: Changing language
sections.body: Choose Hausa or English in the header or footer. You will be taken to the equivalent version of the page you are reading.

sections.title: The reporting process
sections.body: A reporter describes what happened through the form and internal staff review the information. An account is not required.

sections.title: Information to prepare
sections.body: Prepare a short account of what was observed, when and where it happened, and why it may be important. Avoid adding personal information that is not relevant.

sections.title: Safe and responsible reporting
sections.body: Share what is known without inventing allegations or putting yourself or another person at risk. Do not upload passwords, unnecessary identity documents, or files you are not permitted to share.

sections.title: Emergencies and general support
sections.body: This platform is not a replacement for emergency services. For general support, use the official details once confirmed on the Contact us page.

help.reportingInactive: The incident reporting form is available; it does not provide public report tracking.

about.title: About the Garkuwa Platform
about.introduction: This platform is being developed to help people access useful public information and share incident information through an appropriate channel.

sections.title: Hausa first, with English support
sections.body: Hausa is the primary language to improve access to information. English is supported in the same application rather than a separate product.

sections.title: Separate workflows
sections.body: Content intended for publication will follow a verification workflow. Confidential reports will follow a separate internal review workflow.

sections.title: Responsible operational use
sections.body: The platform is intended to support useful work and collaboration with public stakeholders in Nigeria without claiming a formal government endorsement.

sections.title: Incremental delivery
sections.body: The foundation and informational pages are being delivered first. Additional services will be introduced in stages after further review and testing.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.introduction: Confirmed Garkuwa Foundation contact details will be published here after approval.
contact.sensitiveWarningTitle: Do not send sensitive information through general contact channels
contact.sensitiveWarning: Do not send incident evidence, confidential information or emergency requests through these channels. Use the dedicated incident reporting form instead.
contact.noForm: No contact form or direct email integration is available during this phase.

footer.summary: A Hausa-first platform being developed for verified public information and confidential reporting.
footer.emergencyText: Do not wait for this platform. Contact the appropriate emergency services in your area.
footer.ownership: Garkuwa Foundation. This public platform is provided for community information.

trust.title: Trust and confidentiality notice
trust.body: The reporting form is designed to limit requested information. Do not send sensitive information through ordinary contact channels.

featureStatus.notActive: The reporting form is available; verified news remains under development.

metadata.homeDescription: A Hausa-first platform being developed for verified public information and confidential reporting.
metadata.faqDescription: Answers about the Garkuwa Platform and its planned public services.
metadata.helpDescription: Guidance for using the Garkuwa Platform and understanding the future reporting workflow.
metadata.aboutDescription: The purpose, languages and planned workflows of the Garkuwa Platform.
metadata.contactDescription: Garkuwa Foundation contact placeholders and guidance on using appropriate channels.
metadata.reportIncidentDescription: Submit incident information confidentially without creating an account.

incidentReport.title: Report an incident
incidentReport.introduction: Use this form to send incident information to Garkuwa Foundation for internal review. You do not need to create an account.
incidentReport.privacyBody: Contact details are optional. Avoid including personal information about yourself or others unless it is relevant to the incident. Information is handled carefully, but absolute confidentiality cannot be guaranteed.
incidentReport.emergencyTitle: This is not an emergency service
incidentReport.emergencyBody: If there is immediate danger, do not wait for a response from this platform. Contact the appropriate emergency authorities in your area.
incidentReport.outcomeNotice: Foundation staff will review the report internally. Submission does not guarantee a particular outcome, and no public tracking is provided.

fields.categoryHelp: Choose the category that best matches what happened.
fields.descriptionHelp: Describe what happened, when and where it happened, and what you know. Avoid unnecessary personal information.
fields.severityHelp: This is your best assessment and may be reviewed by staff.
fields.locationHelp: An exact address is not required.
fields.coordinatesHelp: If known, provide both latitude and longitude. We will not request your device location automatically.
fields.contactEnabled: I am willing to be contacted for follow-up
fields.contactHelp: If selected, your contact details are encrypted before storage and used only for possible follow-up. Providing them means the report is not fully anonymous.
fields.name: Name
fields.safeContactInstructionsHelp: For example, suitable times to call. Do not include passwords.
fields.consent: I consent to being contacted for follow-up about this report.

categories.error: Incident categories could not be loaded. Please try again.
categories.empty: No approved incident categories are available right now.

validation.summaryTitle: Please correct the following before submitting the report.
validation.descriptionMin: The description must contain at least 20 characters after outer spaces are removed.
validation.descriptionMax: The description must not exceed 5000 characters.
validation.locationMax: The location description must not exceed 500 characters.
validation.stateMax: The state must not exceed 100 characters.
validation.lgaMax: The local government area must not exceed 100 characters.
validation.coordinatesPair: Latitude and longitude must be provided together.
validation.latitude: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90.
validation.longitude: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180.
validation.instructionsMax: Safe contact instructions must not exceed 500 characters.
validation.contactRequired: Provide a phone number or email address when follow-up is enabled.
validation.preferredPhone: A phone number is required when phone is preferred.
validation.preferredEmail: An email address is required when email is preferred.
validation.consent: Consent is required before contact details can be stored.

errors.validation: Some information is invalid. Review the highlighted fields.
errors.payloadTooLarge: The report is larger than the service can accept. Shorten it and try again.
errors.unsupportedMedia: This type of submission is not supported.
errors.rateLimit: There have been too many submission attempts. Wait before trying again.
errors.network: The reporting service could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The submission took too long. Try again when your connection is stable.
errors.server: The report could not be received right now. Please try again later.

success.title: Your report was received
success.body: The report was received for internal review. No public tracking reference is provided.

admin.title: Administration area
admin.placeholder: The administration area has not been implemented yet.

login.title: Sign in to administration
login.description: Use an approved Garkuwa Foundation staff account.
login.invalidCredentials: The supplied credentials could not be accepted.
login.tooManyAttempts: There have been too many login attempts. Wait before trying again.
login.sessionExpired: Your staff session has expired. Sign in again to continue.
login.networkError: The sign-in service could not be reached. Please try again.
login.securityNotice: Do not share your password. This page will not request it by message or telephone call.

landing.title: Administration area
landing.description: Review submitted incidents and use only the workflow actions authorized for your role. Contact details remain unavailable.
landing.logoutError: Sign out could not be completed. Please try again.

queue.title: Incident queue
queue.description: Review submitted incidents and open a record to use role-authorized workflow controls. Confidential contact information remains unavailable.
queue.error: The incident queue could not be loaded safely. Please try again.

detail.title: Incident detail
detail.readOnly: Contact details and unrestricted editing are not available.
detail.workflowScope: This view permits only the workflow actions authorized for your staff role. Contact details remain unavailable.
detail.notFound: The requested incident could not be found.
detail.error: The incident could not be loaded safely. Please try again.

workflow.title: Workflow controls
workflow.description: Apply only the reviewed status or assignment change needed for this incident.
workflow.requiredReason: A reason is required for this transition.
workflow.confirmClose: I confirm that this incident should be closed.
workflow.confirmReject: I confirm that this incident should be rejected.
workflow.confirmRequired: Confirm this high-impact change before submitting.
workflow.updateFailed: The workflow could not be updated safely. Try again.
workflow.conflict: This incident changed elsewhere. Refresh the page before trying again.
workflow.sessionExpired: Your session is no longer valid. Sign in again.
workflow.forbidden: Your staff role does not permit this action.
workflow.confirmUnassign: I confirm that this incident should be unassigned.
workflow.noAssignmentChange: Choose a different assignee before submitting.
workflow.controlsUnavailable: Workflow controls are unavailable for your role.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.description: Your staff role does not permit access to incident moderation records.
